---
title: " "
page-layout: full
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    css: styles.css
---

```{=html}
<style>
.quarto-title-block,#title-block-header{display:none!important}
body,html{margin:0;padding:0;overflow-x:hidden;background:#0a0f1a}
#quarto-content,#quarto-document-content,.page-layout-full,
main.content,.quarto-container{max-width:100%!important;padding:0!important;margin:0!important}

.navbar{
  background:#0a0f1a!important;
  border-bottom:none!important;
  box-shadow:0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,.08),0 4px 24px rgba(0,0,0,.4)!important;
  padding:.6rem 2rem!important;
}
.navbar-brand,.navbar-brand:hover{color:#fff!important;font-weight:700;font-size:1rem}
.navbar .nav-link{color:rgba(255,255,255,.7)!important;font-weight:500;font-size:.92rem}
.navbar .nav-link:hover,.navbar .nav-link.active{color:#10b981!important}
.navbar-nav .dropdown-menu{background:#141922!important;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.08)!important;box-shadow:0 8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,.5)!important}
.navbar-nav .dropdown-item{color:rgba(255,255,255,.75)!important}
.navbar-nav .dropdown-item:hover{background:rgba(16,185,129,.12)!important;color:#fff!important}
.quarto-search-button{color:rgba(255,255,255,.5)!important}

.hero{
  width:100vw;
  margin-left:calc(-50vw + 50%);
  min-height:100vh;
  position:relative;
  display:flex;
  flex-direction:column;
  justify-content:flex-end;
  overflow:hidden;
}

.hero-bg{
  position:absolute;inset:0;
  background-image:url('bogota-night.png');
  background-size:cover;
  background-position:center 30%;
  z-index:0;
}

.hero-overlay{
  position:absolute;inset:0;
  background:
    linear-gradient(to bottom,
      rgba(8,13,26,.15) 0%,
      rgba(8,13,26,.28) 25%,
      rgba(8,13,26,.65) 55%,
      rgba(8,13,26,.94) 80%,
      rgba(8,13,26,1)   100%);
  z-index:1;
}

.hero-body{
  position:relative;z-index:2;
  padding:0 80px 64px;
  max-width:900px;
}

.hero-eyebrow{
  display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;
  color:rgba(255,255,255,.5);
  font-size:.72rem;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:2px;
  text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:20px;
}
.hero-eyebrow::before{
  content:'';display:block;width:24px;height:1.5px;
  background:#10b981;flex-shrink:0;
}

.hero-title{
  font-size:clamp(3rem,6vw,5.5rem);
  font-weight:800;color:#fff;
  line-height:1.04;margin:0 0 20px;
  letter-spacing:-2px;
}
.hero-title span{color:#10b981}

.hero-sub{
  font-size:1.1rem;color:rgba(255,255,255,.72);
  line-height:1.75;max-width:620px;margin-bottom:40px;
}

.hero-btns{display:flex;gap:14px;align-items:center;flex-wrap:wrap}
.hbtn{
  display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
  width:210px;height:52px;
  border-radius:6px;font-weight:700;font-size:.92rem;
  text-decoration:none!important;transition:all .2s;
  box-sizing:border-box;letter-spacing:.2px;
}
.hbtn-solid{background:#10b981;color:#fff!important;box-shadow:0 4px 20px rgba(16,185,129,.4)}
.hbtn-solid:hover{background:#059669;transform:translateY(-2px);box-shadow:0 8px 28px rgba(16,185,129,.45)}
.hbtn-border{background:transparent;color:#fff!important;border:1.5px solid rgba(255,255,255,.38)}
.hbtn-border:hover{border-color:#10b981;color:#10b981!important}

.hero-pills{
  position:relative;z-index:2;
  display:flex;gap:12px;flex-wrap:wrap;
  padding:0 80px 48px;
}
.hero-pill{
  display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;
  background:rgba(255,255,255,.06);
  border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.14);
  color:rgba(255,255,255,.7);
  font-size:.75rem;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:1.2px;
  text-transform:uppercase;padding:10px 20px;
  border-radius:4px;text-decoration:none!important;
  transition:all .2s;backdrop-filter:blur(8px);
}
.hero-pill:hover{background:rgba(16,185,129,.18);border-color:#10b981;color:#10b981!important}
.hero-pill-icon{font-size:.9rem}

.stat-strip{
  width:100vw;margin-left:calc(-50vw + 50%);
  background:#0f1520;
  border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.06);
  display:flex;justify-content:center;flex-wrap:wrap;
}
.stat-item{
  display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;
  padding:24px 56px;border-right:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.06);
}
.stat-item:last-child{border-right:none}
.stat-num{font-size:2rem;font-weight:800;color:#fff;line-height:1}
.stat-num.accent{color:#10b981}
.stat-lbl{font-size:.68rem;color:rgba(255,255,255,.4);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:1px;margin-top:6px}

.fw{width:100vw;margin-left:calc(-50vw + 50%)}
.fw-pad{padding:80px 80px}
.inner{max-width:1280px;margin:0 auto}

.eyebrow{
  font-size:.68rem;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:2px;
  text-transform:uppercase;color:#10b981;margin-bottom:10px;
}
.sec-h{font-size:clamp(1.8rem,3vw,2.6rem);font-weight:800;color:#fff;margin:0 0 14px;line-height:1.15}
.sec-h.dark{color:#0d1f2d}
.sec-p{font-size:.98rem;color:rgba(255,255,255,.55);line-height:1.8;max-width:640px}
.sec-p.dark{color:#4b6a6a}

.bg-sec{background:#111827}

.bg-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1.1fr 1fr;gap:60px;align-items:start;margin-top:40px}

.bg-text p{font-size:1rem;color:rgba(255,255,255,.65);line-height:1.88;margin-bottom:18px}
.bg-text p strong{color:#fff}
.bg-text p:last-child{margin-bottom:0}

.bg-cards{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:14px}
.bg-card{
  background:#1a2236;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.07);
  border-radius:10px;padding:18px 20px;
  display:flex;gap:16px;align-items:flex-start;
  transition:border-color .2s,transform .2s;
}
.bg-card:hover{border-color:rgba(16,185,129,.4);transform:translateX(4px)}
.bc-icon{flex-shrink:0;margin-top:2px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;width:40px;height:40px;background:rgba(16,185,129,.1);border-radius:8px;}
.bc-title{display:block;color:#fff;font-size:.9rem;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:5px}
.bc-body{color:rgba(255,255,255,.5);font-size:.81rem;line-height:1.6;margin:0}

.mod-sec{background:#0a0f1a}

.flow-row{
  display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0;
  margin:20px 0 44px;flex-wrap:wrap;
}
.flow-step{
  display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;
  background:#141d2e;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.08);
  border-radius:6px;padding:12px 20px;
  color:rgba(255,255,255,.75);font-size:.84rem;font-weight:600;
}
.flow-step-num{
  width:24px;height:24px;background:#10b981;border-radius:50%;
  display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
  font-size:.68rem;font-weight:800;color:#fff;flex-shrink:0;
}

.flow-arrow{
  color:rgba(255,255,255,.3);
  font-size:1.3rem;
  margin:0 12px;
  line-height:1;
}

.mod-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:20px}
.mod-card{
  background:#111827;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.07);
  border-radius:12px;padding:28px 24px;position:relative;overflow:hidden;
  transition:border-color .2s,transform .2s;
}
.mod-card::after{
  content:'';position:absolute;bottom:0;left:0;right:0;height:2px;
  background:linear-gradient(90deg,#10b981,#06b6d4);
  transform:scaleX(0);transform-origin:left;transition:transform .3s;
}
.mod-card:hover{border-color:rgba(16,185,129,.3);transform:translateY(-4px)}
.mod-card:hover::after{transform:scaleX(1)}

.mod-num{font-size:.65rem;font-weight:800;color:#10b981;letter-spacing:2.5px;margin-bottom:14px}
.mod-icon{display:flex;align-items:center;margin-bottom:18px;}
.mod-card h3{font-size:1rem;font-weight:700;color:#fff;margin:0 0 10px;line-height:1.3}
.mod-card p{font-size:.83rem;color:rgba(255,255,255,.52);line-height:1.75;margin-bottom:14px}
.mod-list{list-style:none;padding:0;margin:0}
.mod-list li{font-size:.79rem;color:rgba(16,185,129,.85);padding:3px 0 3px 15px;position:relative}
.mod-list li::before{content:'→';position:absolute;left:0;opacity:.7;font-size:.72rem}


.del-sec{background:#f8f9fa}

.del-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:20px;margin-top:40px}
.del-card{
  background:#fff;border:1px solid #e8f0ed;
  border-radius:12px;padding:26px 20px;
  display:flex;flex-direction:column;
  transition:box-shadow .2s,transform .2s;
}
.del-card:hover{box-shadow:0 8px 32px rgba(16,185,129,.1);transform:translateY(-4px)}
.del-icon{display:flex;align-items:center;margin-bottom:14px;}
.del-card h4{font-size:.95rem;font-weight:700;color:#0d1f2d;margin:0 0 8px}
.del-card p{font-size:.81rem;color:#4b6a6a;line-height:1.65;margin-bottom:18px;flex:1}
.del-link{font-size:.8rem;font-weight:700;color:#0f766e!important;text-decoration:none!important;margin-top:auto}
.del-link:hover{color:#0d3d50!important}

.tech-sec{background:#0f1520}

.tech-grid{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:10px;margin-top:28px;justify-content:center}
.tech-chip{
  background:rgba(255,255,255,.05);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.1);
  color:rgba(255,255,255,.75);font-size:.84rem;font-weight:600;
  padding:9px 22px;border-radius:4px;transition:all .2s;
}
.tech-chip:hover{background:rgba(16,185,129,.12);border-color:#10b981;color:#10b981}


.site-footer{
  width:100vw;margin-left:calc(-50vw + 50%);
  background:#060b14;
  border-top:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.05);
  color:rgba(255,255,255,.3);
  text-align:center;font-size:.73rem;padding:22px 20px;letter-spacing:.5px;
}


@media(max-width:1100px){
  .hero-body,.hero-pills,.fw-pad{padding-left:40px;padding-right:40px}
  .bg-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}
  .mod-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}
  .del-grid{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr)}
  .stat-item{padding:18px 28px}
}
@media(max-width:640px){
  .hero-body,.hero-pills,.fw-pad{padding-left:24px;padding-right:24px}
  .hero-title{font-size:2.6rem;letter-spacing:-1px}
  .hbtn{width:160px;height:46px;font-size:.86rem}
  .del-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}
  .stat-item{padding:16px 18px}
  .flow-row{flex-direction:column;align-items:flex-start}
  .flow-arrow{transform:rotate(90deg)}
}
</style>


<section class="hero">
  <div class="hero-bg"></div>
  <div class="hero-overlay"></div>

  <div class="hero-body">
    <div class="hero-eyebrow">COFINFAD · Visual Analytics · Group 7</div>
    <h1 class="hero-title">
      Colombian Fintech<br>
      <span>Customer</span> Analytics
    </h1>
    <p class="hero-sub">
      An interactive visual analytics platform built on 48,723 customer records
      from a Colombian fintech dataset — uncovering who your customers are,
      how they engage, and which groups are at highest risk of churning.
    </p>
    <div class="hero-btns">
      <a href="proposal.qmd" class="hbtn hbtn-solid">Explore the Project</a>
      <a href="https://ligen.shinyapps.io/isss608_vaa_colombianfintech-project-shiny/"
         class="hbtn hbtn-border" target="_blank">▶ Launch Shiny App</a>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="hero-pills">
    <a href="module_overview.qmd" class="hero-pill">
      <span class="hero-pill-icon">👥</span> Customer Overview
    </a>
    <a href="module_engagement.qmd" class="hero-pill">
      <span class="hero-pill-icon">📱</span> Engagement
    </a>
    <a href="module_retention.qmd" class="hero-pill">
      <span class="hero-pill-icon">🎯</span> Retention &amp; Value
    </a>
    <a href="https://ligen.shinyapps.io/isss608_vaa_colombianfintech-project-shiny/"
       class="hero-pill" target="_blank">
      <span class="hero-pill-icon">🖥️</span> Shiny App
    </a>
  </div>
</section>

<div class="stat-strip">
  <div class="stat-item"><div class="stat-num">48,723</div><div class="stat-lbl">Customer Records</div></div>
  <div class="stat-item"><div class="stat-num">57</div><div class="stat-lbl">Variables</div></div>
  <div class="stat-item"><div class="stat-num accent">3</div><div class="stat-lbl">Analytical Modules</div></div>
  <div class="stat-item"><div class="stat-num">20+</div><div class="stat-lbl">Colombian Cities</div></div>
  <div class="stat-item"><div class="stat-num accent">R Shiny</div><div class="stat-lbl">Platform</div></div>
</div>


<section class="fw bg-sec">
  <div class="fw-pad inner">
    <div class="eyebrow">Background</div>
    <h2 class="sec-h">Why This Project Matters</h2>
    <div class="bg-grid">
      <div class="bg-text">
        <p>Colombia's fintech sector has grown rapidly over the past decade, driven by
        rising smartphone penetration, government-led financial inclusion initiatives,
        and a young, digitally active population. By 2024, the country hosted over
        <strong>300 active fintech companies</strong> — yet most still lacked robust
        tools to understand customer behaviour at scale.</p>
        <p>This project uses the <strong>COFINFAD</strong> (Colombian Fintech Financial
        Analytics Dataset) — a 48,723-record customer file with 57 features spanning
        demographics, product ownership, transaction behaviour, digital engagement,
        satisfaction scores, churn probability, and customer lifetime value.</p>
        <p>Our goal is to build a <strong>web-enabled visual analytics application</strong>
        that turns raw data into an interactive decision-support system — enabling
        product managers, CRM teams, and analysts to explore customer dynamics
        without writing a single line of code.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="bg-cards">
        <div class="bg-card">
          <div class="bc-icon">
            <svg width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#10b981" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
              <circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10"/>
              <line x1="2" y1="12" x2="22" y2="12"/>
              <path d="M12 2a15.3 15.3 0 0 1 4 10 15.3 15.3 0 0 1-4 10 15.3 15.3 0 0 1-4-10 15.3 15.3 0 0 1 4-10z"/>
            </svg>
          </div>
          <div>
            <span class="bc-title">Colombian Fintech Context</span>
            <p class="bc-body">Colombia ranks among the top 3 fintech markets in Latin America.
            The dataset spans 20+ departments, capturing rich geographic and
            socioeconomic variation across a diverse customer base.</p>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="bg-card">
          <div class="bc-icon">
            <svg width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#10b981" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
              <ellipse cx="12" cy="5" rx="9" ry="3"/>
              <path d="M21 12c0 1.66-4 3-9 3s-9-1.34-9-3"/>
              <path d="M3 5v14c0 1.66 4 3 9 3s9-1.34 9-3V5"/>
            </svg>
          </div>
          <div>
            <span class="bc-title">The COFINFAD Dataset</span>
            <p class="bc-body">48,723 customer records · 57 variables · demographics,
            acquisition channels, product ownership (savings, credit, loans,
            investments, insurance), engagement behaviour, satisfaction, NPS,
            churn probability, and customer lifetime value.</p>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="bg-card">
          <div class="bc-icon">
            <svg width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#10b981" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
              <circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10"/>
              <line x1="12" y1="8" x2="12" y2="12"/>
              <line x1="12" y1="16" x2="12.01" y2="16"/>
            </svg>
          </div>
          <div>
            <span class="bc-title">Business Questions Addressed</span>
            <p class="bc-body">Who are our customers and where are they? Which segments churn most?
            Which customers generate the highest lifetime value? Where should
            retention and cross-selling efforts be focused?</p>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<section class="fw mod-sec">
  <div class="fw-pad inner">
    <div class="eyebrow">Analytical Modules</div>
    <h2 class="sec-h">A Progressive Analytical Journey</h2>
    <p class="sec-p">Three interconnected modules guide users from a broad population
    overview down to targeted retention strategies.</p>

    <div class="flow-row">
      <div class="flow-step">
        <div class="flow-step-num">1</div>Customer Structure
      </div>
      <span class="flow-arrow">→</span>
      <div class="flow-step">
        <div class="flow-step-num">2</div>Engagement &amp; Experience
      </div>
      <span class="flow-arrow">→</span>
      <div class="flow-step">
        <div class="flow-step-num">3</div>Retention &amp; Value
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="mod-grid">
      <div class="mod-card">
        <div class="mod-num">01</div>
        <span class="mod-icon">
          <svg width="32" height="32" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#10b981" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
            <path d="M17 21v-2a4 4 0 0 0-4-4H5a4 4 0 0 0-4 4v2"/>
            <circle cx="9" cy="7" r="4"/>
            <path d="M23 21v-2a4 4 0 0 0-3-3.87"/>
            <path d="M16 3.13a4 4 0 0 1 0 7.75"/>
          </svg>
        </span>
        <h3>Customer Overview &amp; Segmentation</h3>
        <p>Understand the demographic and geographic structure of the customer base.
        Explore how age, income bracket, and acquisition channel relate to segment
        membership and product adoption.</p>
        <ul class="mod-list">
          <li>Segment distribution by age group</li>
          <li>Acquisition channel breakdown</li>
          <li>Financial product adoption rates</li>
          <li>City-level behavioural clustering heatmap</li>
        </ul>
      </div>
      <div class="mod-card">
        <div class="mod-num">02</div>
        <span class="mod-icon">
          <svg width="32" height="32" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#10b981" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
            <rect x="5" y="2" width="14" height="20" rx="2" ry="2"/>
            <line x1="12" y1="18" x2="12.01" y2="18"/>
            <path d="M9 7h6M9 11h6M9 15h3"/>
          </svg>
        </span>
        <h3>Customer Engagement &amp; Experience</h3>
        <p>Analyse how customers interact with the platform through app usage,
        feature diversity, and transaction activity. Measure service quality
        through satisfaction, NPS, and complaint patterns.</p>
        <ul class="mod-list">
          <li>App login frequency by segment</li>
          <li>Satisfaction and NPS distributions</li>
          <li>Top complaint topic analysis</li>
          <li>Support tickets vs satisfaction scatter</li>
        </ul>
      </div>
      <div class="mod-card">
        <div class="mod-num">03</div>
        <span class="mod-icon">
          <svg width="32" height="32" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#10b981" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
            <polyline points="22 12 18 12 15 21 9 3 6 12 2 12"/>
          </svg>
        </span>
        <h3>Retention Risk &amp; Customer Value</h3>
        <p>Identify customers most likely to churn and those generating the highest
        long-term value. Inform targeted retention and growth strategies.</p>
        <ul class="mod-list">
          <li>Churn probability distribution</li>
          <li>CLV tier breakdown</li>
          <li>Churn vs CLV risk-value scatter</li>
          <li>Segment-level retention prioritisation</li>
        </ul>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<section class="fw del-sec">
  <div class="fw-pad inner">
    <div class="eyebrow" style="color:#0f766e">Deliverables</div>
    <h2 class="sec-h dark">Project Components</h2>
    <p class="sec-p dark">Everything built as part of this project — interactive app,
    proposal, module write-ups, and research poster.</p>
    <div class="del-grid">
      <div class="del-card">
        <div class="del-icon">
          <svg width="28" height="28" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#0f766e" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
            <rect x="2" y="3" width="20" height="14" rx="2" ry="2"/>
            <line x1="8" y1="21" x2="16" y2="21"/>
            <line x1="12" y1="17" x2="12" y2="21"/>
          </svg>
        </div>
        <h4>Shiny Application</h4>
        <p>Fully interactive R Shiny dashboard with three analytical modules,
        real-time sidebar filters, and plotly visualisations. Deployed on shinyapps.io.</p>
        <a href="https://ligen.shinyapps.io/isss608_vaa_colombianfintech-project-shiny/"
           target="_blank" class="del-link">Launch App →</a>
      </div>
      <div class="del-card">
        <div class="del-icon">
          <svg width="28" height="28" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#0f766e" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
            <path d="M14 2H6a2 2 0 0 0-2 2v16a2 2 0 0 0 2 2h12a2 2 0 0 0 2-2V8z"/>
            <polyline points="14 2 14 8 20 8"/>
            <line x1="16" y1="13" x2="8" y2="13"/>
            <line x1="16" y1="17" x2="8" y2="17"/>
            <polyline points="10 9 9 9 8 9"/>
          </svg>
        </div>
        <h4>Project Proposal</h4>
        <p>Full proposal including dataset overview, data preparation notes,
        module methodology, prototype sketches, and project schedule.</p>
        <a href="proposal.qmd" class="del-link">View Proposal →</a>
      </div>
      <div class="del-card">
        <div class="del-icon">
          <svg width="28" height="28" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#0f766e" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
            <polyline points="16 18 22 12 16 6"/>
            <polyline points="8 6 2 12 8 18"/>
          </svg>
        </div>
        <h4>Module Write-ups</h4>
        <p>Technical documentation per module: data wrangling, visualisation design
        rationale, interaction principles, and Shiny UI decisions.</p>
        <a href="module_overview.qmd" class="del-link">View Modules →</a>
      </div>
      <div class="del-card">
        <div class="del-icon">
          <svg width="28" height="28" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#0f766e" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
            <rect x="3" y="3" width="18" height="18" rx="2" ry="2"/>
            <line x1="3" y1="9" x2="21" y2="9"/>
            <line x1="3" y1="15" x2="21" y2="15"/>
            <line x1="9" y1="9" x2="9" y2="21"/>
          </svg>
        </div>
        <h4>Project Poster</h4>
        <p>A1 format research poster covering problem statement, methodology,
        key findings, and future directions for the course showcase.</p>
        <a href="poster.qmd" class="del-link">View Poster →</a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<section class="fw tech-sec">
  <div class="fw-pad inner" style="text-align:center">
    <div class="eyebrow" style="justify-content:center;display:flex">Technology</div>
    <h2 class="sec-h">Built With</h2>
    <p class="sec-p" style="margin:0 auto 0">
      All packages on CRAN &nbsp;·&nbsp; App on shinyapps.io &nbsp;·&nbsp; Website on Netlify
    </p>
    <div class="tech-grid">
      <span class="tech-chip">R 4.5</span>
      <span class="tech-chip">Shiny</span>
      <span class="tech-chip">ggplot2</span>
      <span class="tech-chip">plotly</span>
      <span class="tech-chip">tidyverse</span>
      <span class="tech-chip">heatmaply</span>
      <span class="tech-chip">leaflet</span>
      <span class="tech-chip">DT</span>
      <span class="tech-chip">bslib</span>
      <span class="tech-chip">Quarto</span>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<footer class="site-footer">
  COFINFAD &nbsp;·&nbsp; Colombian Fintech Customer Analytics &nbsp;·&nbsp;
  Group 7 &nbsp;·&nbsp; ISSS608 Visual Analytics &amp; Applications &nbsp;·&nbsp; 2026
</footer>
```
